title: taraxacum mutabile
intro: Taraxacum mutabile, also known as the variable dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the same genus as the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum mutabile include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. This plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and liver and kidney disorders, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote detoxification. Taraxacum mutabile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
